%   in folder `xsim/'
%
%     exercise of type `exercise' with id `11'
%
% generated by the `exercise' environment of the
%   `xsim' package v0.20c (2021/02/03)
% from source `revisions_juin' on 2023/06/12 on line 190
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
Calcule les valeurs numériques des expressions suivantes, si tu sais que \(a=4\), \hfill \(b=-2\), \hfill  \(x=-1\), \hfill \(y=2\).
\begin{enumerate}[cols=3]
	\item \(3a + b\)
	\item \(-a - 2x + xy\)
	\item \(b^2 + 5\)
	\item \(a^2 + x^7 - ax\)
	\item \((3 + y)^2 - 5a\)
	\item \(2y + 3b\)
	\item \(a + b + x + y\)
	\item \(a - b - x - y\)
	\item \(b^3 + (-a) - x^4\)
\end{enumerate}
